data: The National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (Undergraduate), formerly the All India Pre-Medical Test, is an entrance examination in India for students who wish to study undergraduate medical courses and dental courses in government or private medical and dental colleges in India.

Physics is the science of matter and its motion

Chemistry is the scientific discipline involved with elements and compounds composed of atoms, molecules and ions: their composition, structure, properties, behavior and the changes they undergo during a reaction with other substances.
Mathematics includes the study of such topics as quantity, structure, space, and change.
Straight Lines and Pair of Straight Lines
If x = a + b, y = a$$\gamma $$  + b$$\beta $$ and z = a$$\beta $$ +b$$\gamma $$ where $$\gamma $$ and $$\beta $$  are the complex cube roots of unity, show that xyz = $${a^3} + {b^3}$$.
Express $${1 \over {1 - \cos \,\theta  + 2i\sin \theta }}$$ in the form x + iy.
